# services.fluent-bit

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.fluent-bit`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.fluent-bit.configurationFile` | `absolute path` | Fluent Bit configuration. See <https://docs.fluentbit.io/manual/administration/configuring-fluent-bit/yaml> for supported values. {option}`configurationFile` takes precedence over {option}`settings`. Note: Restricted evaluation blocks access to paths outside the Nix store. This means detecting content changes for mutable paths (i.e. not input or content-addressed) can't be done. As a result, `nixos-rebuild` won't reload/restart the systemd unit when mutable path contents change. `systemctl restart fluent-bit.service` must be used instead. |
| `services.fluent-bit.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fluent Bit. |
| `services.fluent-bit.graceLimit` | `null or positive integer, meaning >0, or string` | The grace time limit. Sets the systemd unit's `TimeoutStopSec`. The `service.grace` option in the Fluent Bit configuration should be ≤ this option. |
| `services.fluent-bit.package` | `package` | The fluent-bit package to use. |
| `services.fluent-bit.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | See {option}`configurationFile`. {option}`configurationFile` takes precedence over {option}`settings`. |
